rationale: Independently recomputed 150/150 top-five cells as unique_clean with 150 unique mapped session/case pairs.
Reconciled mapping, coverage, top-five score copy, and archived score exports with no duplicate score keys, no score-value mismatches, and no mapping/coverage key deltas.
Confirmed missingness analysis is diagnostic-only and discloses full-universe not-clean selection bias; full 20-team universe remains not analysis-ready.
Confirmed outcome-source evidence supports official/generated coordination wording and does not support expert-rated coordination claims.
Confirmed Beijing/Shanghai comparability is limited to same numeric scale and shared generated report schema surface; same judges/formal rubric are not established.
authorizes_next_step: Phase 2 Gate 0 measurement auditor, fresh and outcome-denylisted, for the approved top-five cohort only.

coordination_source.verdict: official generated/report or rule-kinematic coordination score; expert-rated coordination not proven
coordination_source.pdf_evidence: Beijing Panda and Shanghai WUT_FSD diagnosis PDFs show page-1 0-100 dimensions including traffic coordination, and later traffic-coordination sections decompose it into background-traffic safety/efficiency/comfort components with affected-background-traffic counts.
coordination_source.sql_evidence: tjjhs_referee_scoring has user_id/user_name, score_point1 comfort, and score_point2 system score; it does not expose a rater-level coordination rubric or direct coordination rating field.
coordination_source.rubric_search: No standalone rubric/judge instruction file found by local filename search for rubric, rating, score, rule, judge, manual, guideline, or standard terms under data/onsite_competition.

beijing_shanghai_comparability.same_numeric_scale: supported: both area PDFs and score CSVs use six 0-100 dimensions including coordination
beijing_shanghai_comparability.same_report_schema: partially supported: shared diagnosis labels and coordination subsection structure were observed in Beijing and Shanghai PDFs
beijing_shanghai_comparability.same_judges: not supported: SQL examples show area-specific judge names, e.g. Tongji vs Tongzhou following-car judges
beijing_shanghai_comparability.same_formal_rubric: not established: no formal rubric/rules document found
